reviews.review_description: So I love doing nails but I never have the time to do mine so when I got this game I loved it this is the best game ever!!!

reviews.review_title: So cute, but glitchy and unresponsive.
reviews.review_description: I love creative apps, but I had such a hard time just moving a sticker around, repositioning it, etc. It wouldn’t let me grab it and move it around, and would only respond sometimes. Unfortunate, since otherwise, this was really cute.
Really fun and real but i did have a bit of trouble getting in to the game so i had to download it all again but really fun thanks!!

reviews.review_title: 🙄🙄 hate it i thought it was good
reviews.review_description: in the begging i was putting my hand where the hand was and it would not continue and it took me forever and still never got  so i left the app

if you looking to be a nail tech then download this game right now
it also dont lag, glitch or crash your headset
like i've already said you should download this game!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the love and for the super positive feedback 💅 We’re thrilled you’re enjoying the app! We truly hope Nailit! continues to be your favorite space to play, design and express yourself! Have fun and... more polish, packs and magic coming VERY soon ✨

reviews.review_description: I had so much fun my first time playing! I had a great time giving myself gigantic, glittery talons. I found pressing some of the buttons to be hard, but I might have been playing in a too dim room. There's so many fun options, and everything looks so cute and aesthetic, you can't go wrong. It brings me back to my Barbie dress-up games days.

developer_response.body: The Barbie dress-up flashback? We felt that 💖 Thank you so much for the love! And yes, lighting can definitely affect the hand tracking, so give it a try in a brighter room. Let us know if it goes smoother!

reviews.review_description: I love this I have always wanted to do my nails but there are short so when I saw this game I loved it! Please put a bunch more stuff in shop. I hope all girls see this game and maybe some boys!

developer_response.body:
We're so happy you found Nailit! 💅 Your enthusiasm totally made our day. And don’t worry, we’ve got more goodies coming to the shop soon!
PS: Nail art is for everyone, and we love that you said it
